name: gemdex-droid
description: Droid-native build of Gemdex semantic code search. Same MCP server + skill as the Claude Code plugin, but the PostToolUse auto-reindex hook is written in Droid's single-`command` shape with `${DROID_PLUGIN_ROOT}` so it actually executes under `droid` (the Claude variant silently drops `args[]`).

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API key
gemini_api_key.description: Google AI Studio API key. Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey.

lancedb_path.title: LanceDB path (optional)
lancedb_path.description: Filesystem path for the embedded vector store. Defaults to ~/.gemdex/lance if left blank.
